summary: Comprehensive testing of Saudi Healthcare Command Theme UI completed successfully. All requested features verified: dark theme, Saudi Green/Gold colors, glass-morphism panels, Riyadh cityscape background, EN/AR localization with RTL support, and language toggle functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay blocks language toggle button when modal is open - requires force=True click or closing modal first

passed_tests: Backend API health check at /api/ - PASSED
GET /api/sources returns sources list - PASSED
GET /api/outputs returns outputs list - PASSED
POST /api/chat returns AI response with citations - PASSED
POST /api/status creates status check - PASSED
GET /api/status returns status checks list - PASSED
Saudi Healthcare Command Theme visual verification - dark theme visible ✓
Saudi Green (#006C5B) color scheme verified in page styles ✓
Gold (#C8A86B) accent color verified in page styles ✓
Glass-morphism panels with backdrop-filter: blur(24px) verified ✓
Riyadh cityscape background image reference found ✓
Language toggle button (data-testid='lang-toggle-btn') found and functional ✓
EN/AR toggle works - switches between 'EN' and 'ع' ✓
Arabic RTL layout applied (dir='rtl') when Arabic selected ✓
Sidebar moves to right side in RTL mode ✓
Navigation tabs show Arabic text: نظرة عامة, المحادثة, المصادر, الاستوديو, الملاحظات ✓
Chat view shows 'Health Intelligence Assistant' in EN ✓
Chat view shows 'مساعد الذكاء الصحي' in AR ✓
Upload modal opens with translated tabs (Upload File / رفع ملف) ✓
KPI cards show Arabic labels (إجمالي المصادر, الأجزاء المفهرسة, مخرجات الاستوديو) ✓
HealthOS branding shows correctly (EN: HealthOS, AR: هيلثOS) ✓
All navigation tabs (Overview, Chat, Sources, Studio, Notes) work in both languages ✓
Cairo/Inter fonts applied to UI ✓
seed_data_creation: None required - existing test data was sufficient
context_for_next_testing_agent: Saudi Healthcare Command Theme UI with EN/AR localization fully tested. All 11 requested features verified working. Backend APIs stable. Language toggle functional with RTL support. Minor overlay issue noted in upload modal but does not affect core functionality.
